HGSS.122.0000:
A long time ago, the Whirl Islands used
to be one large island.\f
There were two countries fighting over
the island back then.\f
LUGIA, the guardian of the island, got
upset and cast lightning bolts to tear\r
the island into four pieces, then\r
disappeared into the deep end\r
of the waterfall basin...\f
I will let you through if you bring the
Silver Wing, which is said to have fallen\r
from LUGIA.\f
But the true challenge is whether
LUGIA will appear in front of you.\f
What LUGIA has longed for is the
invisible trust between people and\r
Pokémon...\f
Or the person who can restore such
a relationship...
HGSS.122.0001:
LUGIA, the Pokémon of the island, hid
itself deep in the end of the waterfall\r
basin, and no one has seen it since...\f
If anyone who could restore deep trust
between people and Pokémon were to\r
come here with something linked to\r
LUGIA, it may show itself for such\r
a person...
HGSS.122.0003:
You have found it...
Please go ahead.\f
HGSS.122.0004:
You have found it...
Please go ahead.
HGSS.122.0005:
Silver Wing will merely permit you to go
down the waterfall.\f
If you are not the kind of person who
would restore the trust between people\r
and Pokémon, LUGIA will never show\r
itself to you...
HGSS.122.0006:
Hmmm.\f
So it was you and the Bell!
HGSS.122.0007:
You are quite a remarkable Trainer
for your age...
